title: gitmap help --json
description: Machine-readable shape emitted by `gitmap help --json`. Composes with `--filter <q>` (adds `query`).

version.description: Value of constants.Version at emission time (e.g. "5.43.0").

count.description: Total number of help rows emitted (sum of `groups[].lines.length`).

query.description: Present only when `--filter <q>` was supplied. Verbatim user query.

lines.description: One entry per command row in this group (ANSI stripped, trailing whitespace trimmed).
